response: As a dedicated Medical Transcriptionist and Scribe with over 15 years of experience across diverse specialties including Orthopedics, Cardiology, and Neurology, I offer exceptional proficiency in medical terminology and EMR platforms like eClinicalWorks and Experity. My career has progressed from transcriptionist to supervisor and quality analyst, demonstrating a consistent ability to lead teams, streamline workflows, and maintain high accuracy while meeting strict turnaround times. I combine strong interpersonal skills with a proven track record in customer relationship management and multi-tasking to drive organizational success. Having managed operations in both healthcare and industrial sectors, I bring adaptability, reliability, and a keen willingness to learn new technologies. My expertise includes supervising teams of 10+, conducting performance evaluations, and delivering error-free documentation under pressure. I am eager to leverage my leadership experience and technical skills to contribute immediately to your medical documentation needs. With a typing speed of 70-80 WPM and a commitment to excellence, I am ready to support your physicians and staff effectively. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals.
